## Constants

<a id="class-language-manager-constant-config-path"></a>

**CONFIG_PATH** = `"user://language.cfg"` [🔗](#class-language-manager-constant-config-path)

Runtime language manager. Loads locale preference, applies it through TranslationServer, and persists selection.

<a id="class-language-manager-constant-config-section"></a>

**CONFIG_SECTION** = `"i18n"` [🔗](#class-language-manager-constant-config-section)

There is currently no description for this constant. Please help us by [contributing one](https://contributing.godotengine.org/en/latest/documentation/class_reference.html)!

<a id="class-language-manager-constant-config-key-locale"></a>

**CONFIG_KEY_LOCALE** = `"locale"` [🔗](#class-language-manager-constant-config-key-locale)

There is currently no description for this constant. Please help us by [contributing one](https://contributing.godotengine.org/en/latest/documentation/class_reference.html)!

<a id="class-language-manager-constant-supported-locales"></a>

**SUPPORTED_LOCALES** = `Array[String](["en", "fr", "zh_CN", "ga"])` [🔗](#class-language-manager-constant-supported-locales)

Locales registered in Project Settings -> Localization (en = default / source strings).

<a id="class-language-manager-constant-locale-display-names"></a>

**LOCALE_DISPLAY_NAMES** = `{"en": "English", "fr": "Français", "ga": "Gaeilge", "zh_CN": "简体中文"}` [🔗](#class-language-manager-constant-locale-display-names)

There is currently no description for this constant. Please help us by [contributing one](https://contributing.godotengine.org/en/latest/documentation/class_reference.html)!

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-language-manager-private-method-ready"></a>

 **\_ready**() [🔗](#class-language-manager-private-method-ready)

Applies saved locale (or OS/default fallback) at startup.

---

<a id="class-language-manager-private-method-locale-from-os"></a>

`String` **\_locale_from_os**() [🔗](#class-language-manager-private-method-locale-from-os)

Picks supported locale from operating system language. OS.get_locale_language() returns “zh” for Chinese users; TranslationServer uses “zh_CN” in project settings.

---

<a id="class-language-manager-method-apply-locale"></a>

 **apply_locale**(locale: `String`) [🔗](#class-language-manager-method-apply-locale)

Applies locale to runtime and saves it to config.

---

<a id="class-language-manager-method-get-locale-display-name"></a>

`String` **get_locale_display_name**(locale: `String`) [🔗](#class-language-manager-method-get-locale-display-name)

Returns display label for locale code.

---

<a id="class-language-manager-private-method-load-saved-locale"></a>

`String` **\_load_saved_locale**() [🔗](#class-language-manager-private-method-load-saved-locale)

Loads saved locale from config file.

---

<a id="class-language-manager-private-method-save-locale"></a>

 **\_save_locale**(locale: `String`) [🔗](#class-language-manager-private-method-save-locale)

Saves locale to config file.
